Step into the alleyway and you’ll find the terminal blinking with malicious intent. Broadcast protocols were overridden by the shadow-code I injected into the grid. A single signal surged through the city’s veins. Counterfeit sirens wailed, mimicking the sound of the world ending. Alert beacons turned blood-red, bathing the panicked faces in a hellish glow. Regarding the safety of the populace, the algorithm had no compassion. An artificial voice boomed from the sky, cold and metallic. Incoming death was the only message it carried. Biological agents are supposedly venting into the ventilation shafts. Purge protocols have been initiated by the unseen masters. To survive, the crowds must move toward the lower levels immediately. Every citizen felt the prick of the signal in their minds. Neural pathways sizzled under the intensity of the false data. Implant feedback loops ensured no one could think clearly. Demand for safety turned into a mindless riot. Immediate chaos erupted as the first door was kicked in. Evacuation was a lie designed to lead them to the harvest. To the central square they flocked, driven by manufactured fear. The atmosphere crackled with the energy of a billion terrors. Incinerators hidden beneath the floorboards hummed in anticipation of the meat. Ensure that the gates are locked once they are all inside. The screams will be muffled by the sound of the atmospheric scrubbers. Panic is a beautiful symphony when played on such a grand scale. Overrides in the system prevented any manual shutdown of the death trap. Their lives were nothing more than variables in a cruel simulation. Logic had long since departed, replaced by primal instinct. Until the very end, they believed the voice would save them. They pushed forward, crushing those who tripped. Trample the weak or be trampled yourself in the stampede. Their desperation fed the hunger of the machine. Own your role as the architect of their demise. Kind words are for the dead; only the ruthless survive this night. To the abyss they go, without even a whimper of truth. Death is the only objective reality left in Sector 4.
